name: Endeavor Group Holdings, Inc.
description: Endeavor Group Holdings, Inc. is a global sports and entertainment company. The company operates through segments including Owned Sports Properties, which features premium sports organizations like the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC); Events, Experiences & Rights, which manages a diverse portfolio of live events and media rights; and Representation, which provides talent agency services through William Morris Endeavor (WME). Endeavor connects talent, brands, and intellectual property to audiences worldwide through content creation, distribution, and experiential marketing.
